title: `program` block does not terminate simulation
body: Hello! Simulation does not end after all `initial` processes in the `program` block have completed. Expected behavior is to terminate the simulation as described in IEEE 1800-2023 section "24.3 The program construct": --- --- **Example:** ```systemverilog program top; initial begin $display("hello world"); end endprogram ``` **Output:** ```text ... hello world ``` **Command:** ```bash verilator --binary top.sv && obj_dir/Vtop ``` --- Verilator version (git master): `Verilator 5.029 devel rev v5.028-88-g195a66529` OS (verilator devcontainer): Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
